article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area

briefs.title: BC Manufacturers Can Now Sell Liquor by the Glass in Picnic Areas
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor Control and Licensing Regulation now allows manufacturers to sell and serve their products by the glass in a designated picnic sale area, capped at 1,000 sq metres total across all picnic endorsement areas.
briefs.action_required: Apply via the liquor and cannabis licensing portal to add a sale area or convert your TESA to a permanent picnic endorsement.
briefs.article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area
